phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided visits are available
phrases.cultural_note: Château Gaillard in Amboise is privately owned and offers guided visits by appointment.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the gardens are open to the public
phrases.text_local: Les jardins sont-ils ouverts au public ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay zhar-DAN son-TEEL oo-VAIR oh poo-BLEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The gardens of Château Gaillard feature Renaissance-style terraced gardens and are considered among the earliest examples of Italian garden design in France.
Château Gaillard is privately owned and offers guided visits by appointment; check locally for current opening times.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a vineyard on the property
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un vignoble sur le domaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un veen-YOBL soor luh doh-MEN
phrases.cultural_note: The estate includes a small vineyard producing Touraine-Amboise wine, continuing a tradition of viticulture on this site since the Renaissance.

responses.english: Yes, there are vines on the estate.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah day VEEN-yuh soor luh doh-MEN
responses.french: Oui, il y a des vignes sur le domaine.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which direction the château faces
phrases.text_local: Le château est-il orienté vers la Loire ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh shah-TOH ay-TEEL oh-ree-AHN-tay vair lah LWAR
phrases.cultural_note: Château Gaillard sits on a plateau above Amboise with views toward the Loire, placed to take advantage of the landscape in the Italian manner.

responses.english: Yes, you can see the Loire.
